justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's requested dates and times for the appointments.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent only reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering alternatives.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made two check_availability calls for each date, which could have been combined into one broader search.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was workable but tiring due to the agent repeatedly asking for new dates without offering proactive suggestions.
